item.name: Little Leviathan
item.description:
Even a greatly scaled-down (pun very much intended) version of the Lord of the Whorl is more than a match for all but the most experienced fishers.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: A fish recently discovered in the waters of the southern Strait of Merlthor, named for its resemblance to the Lord of the Whorl. Much like other fish with legendary namesakes, the little Leviathan is anything but small.
